dashboard.welcome_back: Welcome back! Here's what's happening with your claims today.

member_landing.account_error_body: We couldn't retrieve your profile details. Please contact support.
member_landing.empty_body: When you submit your first claim, it will appear here.

referral.title: Invite Friends & Earn
referral.description: Share your referral link and track the reward credit you earn from first paid memberships.
referral.shareText: Get protection for your family with Asistenca membership!
referral.rewardInfoCreditOnly: Members earn {reward} in account credit after the first paid membership activates.
referral.rewardInfoPayout: Members earn {reward} after the first paid membership activates. Payouts unlock once available credit reaches {threshold}.
referral.programDisabled: Member referral rewards are currently disabled for this tenant.

diaspora_ribbon.text: 🇩🇪🇨🇭 For Diaspora: Help while abroad + flight/travel guidance + Green Card

claim_report.description: Use this page to start a new member claim. Share the basic facts first, then our team continues the case inside the existing claims workflow.
claim_report.boundary: This route starts claim intake only. It does not replace review, decision-making, or staff handling.

green_card.description: Green Card and abroad support are handled through the diaspora member area, where the current travel guidance and contact paths already exist.
green_card.boundary: This page points you to the active diaspora flow instead of maintaining a separate pilot-only surface.

benefits.description: Membership benefits, coverage context, and active commercial details are maintained in the membership area.
benefits.boundary: This handoff page does not replace the live membership surface or contract terms.

incident_guide.description: Help Now gives immediate free-zone guidance for the first minutes after an incident. It is a checklist for safety, evidence preservation, and the next explicit member step.
incident_guide.boundary: This page is a Help Now checklist, not the internal operator playbook.
incident_guide.pack_description: Use this sequence before entering personal details. It does not create a claim, CRM lead, or staff handoff automatically.

checklist.scene_safety: Move to safety if you can, secure passengers, and avoid creating new risk at the scene.
checklist.emergency_services: Call local emergency services first if anyone is injured, trapped, threatened, or immediate danger continues.
checklist.document_scene: Take photos or video of positions, plates, damage, road conditions, signs, and visible evidence before items move.
checklist.exchange_information: Exchange driver, vehicle, witness, authority, and available policy details without admitting fault or signing unclear statements.
checklist.record_timeline: Write down the time, location, direction of travel, weather, police presence, and what happened in plain facts.
checklist.preserve_documents: Keep police reports, medical notes, invoices, tow receipts, photos, and messages together for the member case file.

disclaimers.not_insurer_assessment: This is not an assessment or liability decision.
disclaimers.not_professional_opinion: This is not a professional opinion.
disclaimers.educational_only: This is educational and evidence-preserving guidance only.
disclaimers.professional_review_required: Professional review is required before professional recovery action.

incident_guide.member_boundary_body: If you continue into the member zone, you decide what to submit. No member record, claim, CRM lead, or handoff is created from this page without an explicit next action.
incident_guide.no_pii_value: No personal, medical, or claim details are required here.
incident_guide.escalation_body: Use member reporting when you are ready to attach the incident to your account, or contact support if you need human help deciding the next step.

primary.title: When something happens, start here
primary.body: The first step helps you orient yourself, preserve evidence, and decide whether to open a member case.
primary.openCaseSubtitle: Create a file and save evidence

visitor_general.title: Join IDA assistance.
visitor_general.body: Get guided help after an accident, keep documents organized, and open a case when membership is active.

visitor_broker_tpl.title: Start IDA assistance.
visitor_broker_tpl.body: Use IDA to document what happened, preserve files, and continue with a membership-gated case flow.

visitor_diaspora.title: Traveling or living abroad?
visitor_diaspora.body: Use assistance for accident orientation, Green Card context, documents, and clear follow-up steps.

member_active_no_case.title: Need help now?
member_active_no_case.body: Your membership is active. Start a case when facts, photos, or documents need to be saved to your account.

member_active_has_open_case.title: Your case is in progress.
member_active_has_open_case.body: Follow status, documents, and next steps from the case file.

missing_documents.title: Documents are needed.
missing_documents.body: The case needs your document input before the team can continue review.

authorization_needed.title: Authorization is needed.
authorization_needed.body: Professional recovery can continue only after the required authorization, agreement, terms, and audit trail are in place.

member_action.title: Your next case step is ready.
member_action.body: The case file has a member task waiting. Open the next step and provide the requested response.

activate.title: Activate Assistance
activate.body: You can use free orientation now. Activate membership to save a case, track status, use the IDA Card, and reach member support.

firstCase.title: Open your first case
firstCase.body: Start a case file when you are ready to attach facts, evidence, and documents to your account.

missingDocs.title: Upload missing documents
missingDocs.body: Your case needs your document input before the team can continue review.

memberAction.title: Your action is needed
memberAction.body: Review the published next step so the case file can keep moving.

authorization.title: Sign authorization
authorization.body: Professional Recovery can proceed only with authorization, agreement, terms, and an audit trail.

review.title: Case is being reviewed
review.body: Your case is documented and visible. Follow status updates and published next steps from the case file.

history.title: Review previous cases
history.body: No active case is selected. Your closed or saved cases remain available for reference.

inactive.title: What is free and what requires membership
inactive.body: Free self-service includes orientation, checklists, next-step guidance, and document readiness. Member assistance adds a saved case, status, timeline, document vault, IDA Card, and support.

helpNow.title: Scene guide + Green Card
helpNow.body: Choose the country where the accident happened and get the first guidance: police, European Accident Statement, photos, and documents.

reportClaim.title: Report damage
reportClaim.body: Open a case file and save evidence, documents, and case status.

complaint.situation: I received a low or unclear offer
complaint.title: Submit complaint
complaint.body: Use this when there is a refusal, delay, or unclear offer.

procedureGuide.title: Procedure guide
procedureGuide.body: Get procedural steps by country, damage type, and required documents.

recovery.situation: I want Interdomestik to follow the case
recovery.title: Mediation / Recovery
recovery.body: With authorization, Interdomestik may follow the case on your behalf.

flightDelay.title: Delayed flight
flightDelay.body: Check whether a delayed flight may qualify for compensation.

cases.title: Active cases
cases.timelinePreview: The case file is visible. The next status update will appear there.
cases.emptyBody: When damage happens, IDA guides you step by step.

documents.title: Saved documents summary
documents.body: The dashboard shows counts only. Sensitive or medical document content stays inside the protected case flow.
documents.missingActive: Open the vault to see requested uploads for active cases.
documents.missingNoCase: Missing documents will appear after a case is opened.
documents.consent: Medical or sensitive document review requires explicit consent before upload or review.

trust.title: Trust and privacy
trust.body: IDA keeps the case organized and transparent without promising an outcome.

hero.title: Your case file. The right steps. Track the case until closure.
hero.subtitle: When an accident happens, do not improvise: open the case, upload evidence, and track status. We guide you step by step.

trust.caseNumber: Each case gets a unique ID
trust.organizedFile: Documents stay in an organized case file
trust.nextStep: The next step is always clear

abroad.title: Abroad accident help (Green Card)
abroad.body: Get country-specific guidance when incidents happen abroad.

diaspora.title: Diaspora support
diaspora.body: Practical support for members living or traveling outside Kosovo.

fast.title: Fast assistance
fast.body: Reach support quickly and get clear next steps.

claims.title: Your claim status
claims.empty: No active case right now. Report one when you need support.

footer.privacy: Your membership data and case details are handled securely.
footer.security: Need urgent help? Use the 60-second call for guided assistance.

micro.upload_success: Saved to your case file. Nothing is lost.
micro.submit_success: Case accepted. You can track it from the dashboard.
micro.submit_missing: Not required, but it strengthens your case.
micro.error_safe: Action could not be completed. Your data is safe. Try again.

promise.title: Our Promise
promise.body: We help you understand the problem, document the case, and follow the process clearly. We don't promise victory. We promise organization, transparency, and guidance so you are never alone.
